use_cases: Rotating hero headlines with smooth blur transitions between words
Dynamic tagline display in marketing landing pages
Animated word cycling for call-to-action emphasis
Text animation for product feature highlights
Visually engaging word transitions in hero sections
ai_summary: A Framer Motion-powered text cycling component that smoothly transitions between an array of words with blur and opacity effects. The component auto-rotates words at configurable intervals with enter and exit animations, measuring word widths dynamically to prevent layout shifts. Ideal for hero sections and marketing pages needing engaging word-based animations.
